arts.sum: Ahead of the blaugranes lies a run of five matches in just 20 days, four in the league and the quarter-final of the Copa del Rey. Should Barça get past Valencia in that game then there will be a sixth game in the month, the first leg of the semi-final which is scheduled for 25/26 February. On Thursday 6 February at 9.30pm CET Barça face the quarter-final of the Copa del Rey against a Valencia side who lost 7-1 recently in the league to Barça.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford could still join Barcelona... in the summer - report
arts.sum: The signing of Marcus Rashford in the current transfer window is looking less and less likely. That’s because the latest rumors say Barcelona are willing to sign Rashford on a permanent basis in the next window.

arts.ttl: Cubarsi’s driving instructor explains what Barca star Gavi found ‘complicated’
arts.sum: Barcelona's Pau Cubarsi (18) passed his driving test! Pau Cubarsi has been celebrating a decent milestone this week as he’s passed his driving test this week and can ditch his L plates.
The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Barca set to profit as Man City eye move for Nico Gonzalez
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano is reporting that City have made an official approach for former Barca midfielder Nico and want to prise him away from Porto. EXCLUSIVE: Manchester City made formal approach with Porto to ask for Nico González as new midfielder.

arts.ttl: ‘Be happy and trust us’ - Gavi sends message to Barca fans after renewing contract
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi has sent out a message to supporters after committing his long-term future to the Catalan giants. Barcelona have already lifted the Spanish Super Cup this season, and Gavi thinks the team can deliver more silverware in the coming years.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona youngster seals move to Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Friday announced an agreement over the sale of youngster Unai Hernández. The name of youngster Unai has of course dominated the media chatter at…

arts.ttl: How Man City could hand Barcelona a massive financial boost
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona could be afforded an imminent monetary boost by way of Premier League counterparts Manchester City. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who has on Friday…

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s deal for leading January transfer target is ‘almost off’
arts.sum: An update on the efforts of La Liga giants Barcelona to bring in Marcus Rashford from Manchester United this month has on Friday been provided. And the news will mark…
